message:
feat(sync): file-level sync engine with plan-execute pattern and path filtering

Add a file synchronization system and expand learning module:

Sync (crates/wa-core/src/sync.rs):
- SyncItem and SyncFilePlan structs for describing planned file operations
- is_path_denied/is_path_allowed for configurable path filtering with
  glob-style deny/allow lists
- hash_file for content-addressable change detection via SHA-256
- build_file_plan: walk source directory, classify files (new/modified/
  deleted/unchanged), and produce a deterministic plan
- execute_file_plan: apply planned operations with atomic copy+delete
- walk_dir and classify_file helpers for recursive directory traversal
- Comprehensive unit tests: sync status disabled by default, path
  filtering, plan building, and sync direction semantics

Learn (crates/wa-core/src/learn.rs):
- Add test for robot track completion achievement verification
- Expand learning pipeline with additional pattern recognition coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
